title: Translation Models Path
description: Build fluency in Translation Models inside Natural Language Processing by moving from foundational terms into adjacent methods, variants, and extensions.

steps.title: Neural Machine Translation (NMT)
steps.summary: Neural Machine Translation (NMT) belongs to the Natural Language Processing area of AI/ML, within Translation Models. It sits inside Natural Language Processing / Translation Models. Start after Neural Machine Translation and Machine Translation. It opens into Zero-Shot Neural Machine Translation (NMT) and Zero-Shot Neural Machine Translation (NMT) Extensions.
steps.whyIncluded: Start here to anchor the vocabulary and core intuition for this area.

steps.title: Neural Machine Translation
steps.summary: Neural Machine Translation belongs to the Natural Language Processing area of AI/ML, within Translation Models. It sits inside Natural Language Processing / Translation Models. Start after Machine Translation and Neural Network. It opens into Neural Machine Translation (NMT) and Neural Machine Translation Enhancements.
steps.whyIncluded: Use this after the foundations to connect patterns, variants, and system behavior.

steps.title: Attention-based NMT
steps.summary: Attention-based NMT belongs to the Natural Language Processing area of AI/ML, within Translation Models. It sits inside Natural Language Processing / Translation Models. Start after Attention-based Models and Attention-based Networks.
steps.whyIncluded: Treat this as an advanced extension once the earlier terms feel natural.
